description: Standard UDS routine identifiers (Service 0x31) per ISO 14229-1:2020 §10.10.2.4 — the generic 0x0200..0x02FF range plus the 0xFF00..0xFFFF reserved IDs that every ISO-compliant ECU is expected to recognise. OEM-specific routine IDs overlay this set via TOBDOEMCatalog.

entries.name: Erase Memory
entries.notes: Used by the bootloader before RequestDownload.

entries.name: Check Programming Dependencies
entries.notes: Verifies a downloaded image's metadata + signatures.

entries.name: Start Programming Session
entries.notes: Reference routine entry — most OEMs override.

entries.name: OBD-II Generic Test Sequence
entries.notes: Reserved range for emissions-related routine tests.
